title: Match Expression
description: Use the match expression to execute code based on the value of a single variable.
problemStatement:
Pattern matching! Assign the number `1` to a variable `number`. Use a `match` expression to print `"One"` if the value is `1`, and `"Other"` for any other value (`_`).

**Requirement:** Use the `match` keyword specifically.
hints: `match` is like a powerful switch-case found in other languages but exhaustive.
